# Etra: Names & Cultures — sordrenic culture overrides
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === SORDRENIC CULTURES ===

REPLACE:stone_sordrenic_culture = {
	language = stone_sordrenic_dialect
	color = map_jin
	tags = { occitan_gfx french_gfx west_mediterranean_gfx mediterranean_gfx western_european_gfx european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		human_group
		sordrenic_group
	}
}

REPLACE:pantagrins_culture = {
	language = pantagrin_sordrenic_dialect
	color = map_PRU
	tags = { giantsborn_gfx swedish_gfx western_european_gfx european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		sordrenic_group
		giantsborn_group
	}
}

REPLACE:lutin_culture = {
	language = lutin_sordrenic_dialect
	color = map_bjarmian
	tags = { elf_gfx occitan_gfx french_gfx west_mediterranean_gfx mediterranean_gfx western_european_gfx european_gfx }

		sordrenic_group
		elven_group
		ardrainic_group
	}
}
